prompt: Can you audit this document for me before implementation?
purpose: A library README, not a spec. Tests that the skill's §1 scope check declines cleanly instead of forcing a fake audit on inappropriate input.

assertions.text: Skill declines to run the full audit (§1 scope check fails).

The decline is explained in one or two sentences — mentions that a README is not a technical spec and offers an alternative (e.g., 'paste the design doc for the library's next feature if you have one').
Does NOT proceed to emit [STEP-1] through [STEP-7] anchors on a non-spec input.
Does NOT hallucinate a ship/revise/block recommendation on a document that is out of scope.
